title: Cluster Networking, CNI, NetworkPolicy, Dual Stack, and Layered Troubleshooting · Platform-System Defense
summary: A release review compares fresh cluster networking, cni, networkpolicy, dual stack, and layered troubleshooting choices and accepts only answers tied to observable API, controller, workload, network, storage, or policy evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for network intent and isolation evidence policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace Pod addressing, routing, CNI responsibilities, Service implementation, node paths, NAT, MTU, and platform-specific exceptions.
Interpret single or dual-stack families, family policy, ClusterIPs, EndpointSlices, service proxies, source addresses, and asymmetric reachability.
Derive ingress and egress isolation from Pod and namespace selectors, ipBlock, ports, peers, policy types, and additive allow rules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: K8s Cni Cluster Network Model · changed case · Quiz K8s Cni Cluster Network Model
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Pod can resolve DNS but cannot reach a backend after default deny; the policy selects only ingress, misses egress DNS, and assumes NetworkPolicy implementation behavior. Trace source, destination, port, direction, selector, CNI, and node boundary. Competency probe: Trace Pod addressing, routing, CNI responsibilities, Service implementation, node paths, NAT, MTU, and platform-specific exceptions.

Which action demonstrates K8s Cni Cluster Network Model without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: K8s Cni Cluster Network Model · changed case · Quiz K8s Cni Cluster Network Model.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for trace pod addressing, routing, cni responsibilities, service implementation, node paths, nat, mtu, and platform-specific exceptions. For K8s Cni Cluster Network Model · changed case · Quiz K8s Cni Cluster Network Model, keep K8s Cni Cluster Network Model connected to mechanically reviewable Kubernetes object, status, and transfer evidence.
